calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-06-2011 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-26-2011 Continued To Oct-21-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 610

Default Prove Up Hearing
Off Calendar Sep-01-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Judge: Ellen Chaitin, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Brenda Fields #7235.

Andres Sanchez, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Japan Center East Associates LP.
Sheron Chiu, Property Manager for Japan Center East Associates LP, was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendant Genji Antiques, Inc.
Dismissal without prejudice as to defendant Shigeto Murase was filed on February 23, 2001.
Default was entered against defendant Genji Antiques, Inc. on June 27, 2011.
Doe defendants were dismissed on August 29, 2011

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Japan Center East Associates LP and against defendant Genji Antiques, Inc. as follows:

Damages/Principal - $88,164.00.
Attorney Fees - $7,345.50.
Costs - $997.95, for a total judgment in the amount of $96,507.45.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-27-2011 Continued To Sep-09-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 610
